data.body: STORY F ff6f VALIDATED against full held-out oracle: 14/14 held-out + happy passed (implementer saw ONLY happy-path). Caught + fixed: (1) my happy-path test typo (lowercase 'unbounded retry budget' vs seeded 'Unbounded retry budget') — fixed test + removed the implementer's data-search workaround that gamed it (revert-first). (2) hardened AC6 convergence test to 4-round/2-series so it distinguishes per-series (correct=2 polylines) from per-round (wrong=4) — implementer correctly did per-series. Teeth confirmed. Fixed E501/import lint in my test files (ruff format+fix). Gates: make lint clean, make typecheck clean (325 files), 31 audit tests pass, module-size (page.py 394<500) + doc-drift gates pass, CI-faithful sim: F tests skip when fastapi absent. Implementer built server.py /ticket route + page.py (data-shaping, no web imports) + 6 Jinja2 templates. Committing F stacked on change 699.
